beat.title: Camp and Dawn Planning
beat.boundaryReason: The session opens with table recap, character reminders, the party deciding to stay in the workshop for the night, taking a long rest, and then waking before sunrise to debate whether the chapel, kitchens, or barracks offer the safest tunnel route into the manor.
dateEvidence: session.yaml sets drStart to 1748-10-17 and drEnd to 1748-10-18
the DM opens by saying the sun is setting and the party is deciding what to do that evening
the same beat explicitly includes the long rest, then the DM says the party wakes in pre-dawn light before sunrise

beat.title: Through the Overgrown Grounds
beat.boundaryReason: Once the party commits to moving, the whole scene stays focused on crossing the vineyards and formal grounds in stealth: they spot the shadow-cloaked hobgoblin patrol, send Dilion's steampup away as a distraction, slip through the ruined gardens past the medusa fountain, and finally reach the chapel and uncover the buried trapdoor into the crypt.
dateEvidence: this beat starts immediately after the pre-dawn route-planning conversation
the DM repeatedly describes the light as dark, pre-dawn, or barely bright enough to move by
the beat ends at the moment the party drops into the chapel crypt before any later rest or date shift

beat.title: Ambush in the Crypt
beat.boundaryReason: After the party enters the crypt, the beat remains one continuous danger sequence: they scout the tomb, hear the hobgoblins above, set grease and snare around the hatch, kill the shadowsneak that drops in, reset the trap for a second pursuer, and only stop once the immediate fight is over and the crypt is quiet again.
dateEvidence: the fight begins directly after the dawn approach into the crypt and there is no pause or rest between the trapdoor discovery and combat
the transcript treats the two hobgoblin arrivals as one linked ambush sequence in the same crypt space
the beat ends with looting and checking the ring once the crypt falls quiet, still on the same morning

beat.title: The Hidden Manor Study
beat.boundaryReason: With the crypt secured, the party shifts into investigation: they loot relics and hidden supplies, find the secret passage out of the crypt, emerge in a sealed Perdoli study, decode the rotating bookcase, and search the hidden room thoroughly before setting up the next push deeper into the manor.
dateEvidence: this beat starts immediately after the crypt ambush ends and the party returns to searching
the party takes only a short rest in the hidden study, which keeps the action on the same date rather than advancing to another day
nothing in the study-search sequence suggests a later time-of-day change beyond the same morning infiltration

beat.title: Gallery Fight and Basilisk
beat.boundaryReason: The next phase covers the immediate tactical push out of the study: the party opens the secret bookcase, scouts the insect room and open gallery, draws hobgoblin attention, wins a quick indoor skirmish without alerting the manor, and then immediately discovers the chained basilisk in the courtyard when Gaudin risks a closer look.
dateEvidence: the beat begins as soon as the party uses the bookcase mechanism and starts choosing between nearby exits
the hobgoblin fight and the basilisk reveal happen back-to-back with no intervening rest or scene reset
the discussion after Gaudin begins turning to stone still reads as continuous same-morning aftermath

beat.title: Pirate Clues and Ghost
beat.boundaryReason: After surviving the basilisk's gaze, the party slows down to investigate the master chambers: they debate mirror tricks, read the Perdoli and pirate clues, recover the locket and letters to J.M., infer the history of the manor, and finally parley with the pirate ghost until he reveals Grimstone's hidden lair beneath the bedroom floor.
dateEvidence: this beat starts in the immediate aftermath of the basilisk scare, with the party still in the same run of manor exploration
the bedchamber search, paper review, and ghost conversation unfold as one uninterrupted final scene
the session ends on Grimstone's location reveal with no rest, meal, or date rollover after the morning infiltration
